summary: Video-to-animation web application (UI/frontend only) - a marketing website with video upload interface, style selection, and conversion mockup. Note: Actual video processing/AI conversion is not supported by this platform and would need external implementation.
architectural_notes: Video processing/AI conversion not supported - requires external API integration
UI mockup approach: simulate upload/conversion flow without actual video processing
Motoko backend for auth and basic data storage only
No cloud storage or external service integration available on this platform
known_issues: Actual video-to-animation conversion cannot be implemented on this platform
Video upload will be UI-only (no actual video storage/processing)
Platform does not support external AI API integration

existing_features.title: Create a hero section with headline 'Turn Any Video Into Stunning Animation' and a bold call-to-action button
Build a video upload interface that accepts MP4, MOV, and AVI file formats with drag-and-drop support
Create a style selection interface with options for cartoon, anime, Pixar-like, whiteboard animation, comic, and watercolor styles
Implement an animation intensity slider component with visual feedback
Build a before/after video comparison preview interface
Create a progress/loading animation UI that displays during the conversion process
Add a download button for HD video with appropriate UI feedback
Create a 'How It Works' section with four steps: Upload, Choose Style, Animate, and Download
Build a pricing plans page with three tiers: Free, Pro, and Studio
Create a testimonials section with user reviews and feedback
Build an FAQ section with common questions and answers
Create Login and Signup pages with Internet Identity authentication integration
Implement dark and light mode toggle with smooth transitions
Ensure all pages and components are fully responsive and mobile-optimized
Apply smooth animations and transitions throughout the interface for an engaging user experience
Design a clean, futuristic UI with a creative visual theme using distinctive colors (avoiding blue and purple), modern typography, and cohesive styling across all components
Ensure all external links and resources use production-ready URLs and configurations

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with headline and CTA
Video upload interface (MP4, MOV, AVI) - UI only
Style selection interface (cartoon, anime, Pixar, whiteboard, comic, watercolor)
Download button for HD video - UI mockup
Configure the application for production deployment with appropriate canister settings and environment variables
Ensure all frontend assets are optimized and minified for production deployment
Verify all Internet Identity authentication flows work correctly in production environment
